action.reasoning: Observation: DINOv2 frozen backbone linear probe trained 15 epochs, val_ba=0.7731, still improving. Best test score so far is 0.6199 from 5-epoch partial fine-tuning. Analysis: Need to submit this checkpoint to measure actual test performance. The frozen backbone should generalize better to L100 since it preserves domain-invariant features. Decision: Submit current checkpoint for evaluation, then if promising, continue training longer or try unfreezing last 2 blocks.
